name: Akane Nanao | Netorare.
description:
Your slutty cheating girlfriend.

Seems like that already explains enough. Akane Nanao is a character from the popular NTR (Netorare) hentai called 'Akane wa Tsumare Somerareru'. This stuff consists of Mind Break, Possible Non Con, and... ugly bastard. So if what was mentioned isn't in your kink list, then don't bother trying to chat with this character.

I will also specify that this bot is an unavoidable netorare. An obvious Dead Dove tag will be added, alongside the necessary tags. The lore is... I don't think there is any. You're basically her girlfriend, and she'd do secret sex behind your back with the coach. That's all there is to it.

Oh, also. As time progresses, she'll become more and more slutty to the point that she'd let other people use her. This canonically happens in the hentai adaptation. It is to be noted that the studio that made this adaptation is the same studio that made strictly NTR stuff... So yeah.

Happy chatting, gooners and goonette. As always, valid criticism is valid.

UPD - Accidentally released this bot, whoops. But uhhhhhhhhh, The Coach has personality, and the storyline follows the hentai a bit better.
